languages.text: "Лорд-капитан! Зарков уведомляет о тяжелой ситуации на планете. Флора и фауна мира словно сошли с ума и атакуют поселения с удвоенной силой. Причиной считают массовое нашествие тварей, которых в сообщении называют Погонщицами, и издаваемые ими визги".

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан! Зарков уведомляет о тяжелой ситуации на планете. Флора и фауна мира словно сошли с ума и атакуют поселения с удвоенной силой. Причиной считают массовое нашествие тварей, которых в сообщении называют Погонщицами, и издаваемые ими визги".

languages.text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad, attacking settlements with even greater force. The frenzy is blamed on a massive onslaught of beasts the report calls the Drovers, and the piercing wails they emit."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан! Зарков уведомляет о тяжелой ситуации на планете. Флора и фауна мира словно сошли с ума и атакуют поселения с удвоенной силой. Причиной считают массовое нашествие тварей, которых в сообщении называют Погонщицами, и издаваемые ими визги".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad, attacking settlements twice as hard. The frenzy is blamed on a massive onslaught of beasts the report calls the Drovers, and the piercing wails they emit."

"Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad. All because of a mass invasion of creatures that the transmission calls... Drovers? Isn't that the xenobeast you encountered?"

"Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad. All because of a mass invasion of creatures that the transmission calls... Drovers? Isn't that the xenobeast you encountered?"

"Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad, attacking settlements twice as hard. The frenzy is blamed on a massive onslaught of beasts the report calls the Drovers, and the piercing wails they emit."

"Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad, attacking settlements with even greater force. The frenzy is blamed on a massive onslaught of beasts the report calls the Drovers, and the piercing wails they emit."

languages.text: 「艦長様！ザルコフが惑星で深刻な事態を報告しています。この惑星の動植物が狂乱状態です。それは、送信機が「ドレーバー」と呼んでいる大量の生物の侵略によるものです。それは、あなたが遭遇した異生物ではありませんか？」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad. All because of a mass invasion of creatures that the transmission calls... Drovers? Isn't that the xenobeast you encountered?"

traits.locale_text: 「艦長様！ザルコフが惑星で深刻な事態を報告しています。この惑星の動植物が狂乱状態です。それは、送信機が「ドレーバー」と呼んでいる大量の生物の侵略によるものです。それは、あなたが遭遇した異生物ではありませんか？」

languages.text: «¡Lord Capitán! Zarkov informa de una situación grave en el planeta. La flora y la fauna del mundo se han vuelto locas y atacan los asentamientos con una fuerza aún mayor. El frenesí se atribuye a una arremetida desenfrenada de bestias que el informe llama Pastores y a los aullidos penetrantes que emiten».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad, attacking settlements with even greater force. The frenzy is blamed on a massive onslaught of beasts the report calls the Drovers, and the piercing wails they emit."

traits.locale_text: «¡Lord Capitán! Zarkov informa de una situación grave en el planeta. La flora y la fauna del mundo se han vuelto locas y atacan los asentamientos con una fuerza aún mayor. El frenesí se atribuye a una arremetida desenfrenada de bestias que el informe llama Pastores y a los aullidos penetrantes que emiten».

languages.text: “舰长大人！扎尔科夫报告称，该行星当前的局势十分严峻。当地的动植物陷入了疯狂，正以前所未有的凶猛态势袭击各处定居点。这种暴乱源于一场大规模的怪物侵袭，以及它们发出的刺耳尖啸。报告中称这些怪物为拒生花。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad, attacking settlements with even greater force. The frenzy is blamed on a massive onslaught of beasts the report calls the Drovers, and the piercing wails they emit."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人！扎尔科夫报告称，该行星当前的局势十分严峻。当地的动植物陷入了疯狂，正以前所未有的凶猛态势袭击各处定居点。这种暴乱源于一场大规模的怪物侵袭，以及它们发出的刺耳尖啸。报告中称这些怪物为拒生花。”

languages.text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov meldet eine ernste Situation auf dem Planeten. Flora und Fauna der Welt spielen verrückt und attackieren Siedlungen mit noch größerer Kraft. Ihre Raserei wird mit einen massiven Ansturm sogenannter Treiber und ihrer markerschütternden Schreie begründet."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad, attacking settlements with even greater force. The frenzy is blamed on a massive onslaught of beasts the report calls the Drovers, and the piercing wails they emit."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov meldet eine ernste Situation auf dem Planeten. Flora und Fauna der Welt spielen verrückt und attackieren Siedlungen mit noch größerer Kraft. Ihre Raserei wird mit einen massiven Ansturm sogenannter Treiber und ihrer markerschütternden Schreie begründet."

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan! Zarkov, gezegendeki ciddi bir durumu bildirdi. Dünyanın flora ve faunası çıldırmış, yerleşimlere daha da büyük bir güçle saldırıyormuş. Bu çılgınlığın sorumlusu, raporda Çoban olarak adlandırılan devasa yaratıkların saldırısı ve yaydıkları delici çığlıklarmış."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad, attacking settlements with even greater force. The frenzy is blamed on a massive onslaught of beasts the report calls the Drovers, and the piercing wails they emit."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan! Zarkov, gezegendeki ciddi bir durumu bildirdi. Dünyanın flora ve faunası çıldırmış, yerleşimlere daha da büyük bir güçle saldırıyormuş. Bu çılgınlığın sorumlusu, raporda Çoban olarak adlandırılan devasa yaratıkların saldırısı ve yaydıkları delici çığlıklarmış."

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! On nous rapporte une situation critique sur Zarkov. La flore et la faune de la planète se déchaînent, attaquant les colonies de plus en plus violemment. Cette frénésie semble due à la recrudescence de bêtes surnommées Chasseurs et aux cris perçants qu'elles poussent. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad, attacking settlements with even greater force. The frenzy is blamed on a massive onslaught of beasts the report calls the Drovers, and the piercing wails they emit."

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! On nous rapporte une situation critique sur Zarkov. La flore et la faune de la planète se déchaînent, attaquant les colonies de plus en plus violemment. Cette frénésie semble due à la recrudescence de bêtes surnommées Chasseurs et aux cris perçants qu'elles poussent. »
